R. 12/15/2007-RI^ftRtZ9tM] t’JRR RfRR, R^RR 4tfqq fc'q'Jl : 1 2JeT fRRR RRR Ri' RRRR if RI.RR.fR. 711(31) aittel 17 lq«K, 2006 ?IR y=biRria fRiR RR I 2357 GI/2011 MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th June, 2011 GS.R 477(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 22C. of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the Appellate Authority (Allowances payable to, and other terms and conditions of service of Chairperson and Members and the manner of meeting expenditure ofthe Authority) Rules, 2006, namely:— 1. Short Title and Commencement—(1) These rules may be called the Appellate Authority (Allowances payable to, and other terms and conditions of service of Chairperson and members and the manner of meeting expenditure of the Authority) Amendment Rules, 2011. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Appellate Authority (Allowances payable to, and other terms and conditions of service of Chairperson and Members and the manner of meeting expenditure of the Authority) Rules, 2006,— (i) for rule 3, the following rule shall be substituted, namely “3. Allowances.—The Chairperson and the Members of the Authority shall be paid the following amount for each day of sitting, namely:— Chairperson — Rupees Six Thousand. Member — Rupees Four Thousand Five Hundred”; (ii) explanation to rule 4 shall be omitted. [F.No. 12/15/2007-1GC/PI] RENUKA KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note:—The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, vide number GS.R 711(E), dated the 17th November, 2006. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
